hero.subtitle: Premium carob products and legumes exported from the fertile Saïss region to international markets.

home.products_sub: Premium raw materials selected from the heart of the Saïss region, exported to international markets.
home.carob_desc: Raw carob, seeds, pulp and flour — a complete range for the food, pharmaceutical and cosmetic industries.
home.legumes_desc: All varieties of legumes for import-export: lentils, chickpeas, fava beans, kidney beans and more.
home.why_sub: Our commitment to quality, traceability and sustainability sets us apart in international markets.
home.why_quality_desc: Our products meet the most demanding international standards. Quality control at every step.
home.why_trace_desc: From harvest to delivery, every batch is traceable. Full transparency for our partners.
home.why_sustain_desc: Local sourcing, partnerships with Saïss farmers, environmental respect.
home.why_expertise_desc: We export to Europe, Asia, the Middle East and the Americas. Mastered logistics.
home.apps_sub: From food manufacturing to cosmetics, carob integrates into numerous industrial processes.
home.markets_sub: Partners on every continent — Europe, North America, Middle East, Asia, Africa.
home.news_sub: Follow the latest on carob and agricultural markets.
home.cta_sub: Contact our team for a personalized quote or information about our products.

about.hero_sub: Moroccan agricultural product exporters from the Saïss region
about.story_p1: Founded in 2008, Les Greniers du Saïss is a Moroccan company specializing in the export of carob products (Kharoub) and legumes. Based in Fez, in the heart of the fertile Saïss plain — one of Morocco's agricultural heartlands — the company benefits from privileged access to exceptional raw materials.
about.story_p2: We work in direct partnership with local farmers and producers to ensure quality at the source, before packaging and exporting our products to the most demanding international markets.
about.val_quality_desc: Rigorous control at every stage, from harvest to packaging.
about.val_partner_desc: Long-term relationships with our farmers and clients.
about.val_transparency_desc: Full traceability and rigorous documentation for every batch.
about.val_innovation_desc: Continuous development of our range to meet market needs.
about.saiss_p1: The Saïss plain stretches between Fez and Meknes, in the heart of Morocco. Its rich soils and temperate climate make it one of the most productive agricultural areas in the country.
about.saiss_p2: This region is renowned for the quality of its cereals and legumes. The carob trees that grow there produce fruit of exceptional nutritional richness, prized by food and pharmaceutical industries worldwide.

products.hero_sub: Exceptional agricultural raw materials from Morocco
products.cta_quote: Request a Quote for This Product

carob_raw.hero_sub: Whole dried carob pods harvested in the Saïss region
carob_raw.desc: Raw carob (Kharoub) is the whole pod of the carob tree (Ceratonia siliqua), naturally dried. Rich in natural sugars, fiber and tannins, it is the raw material for many derived products. Our pods are sorted and cleaned before packaging.

carob_seeds.hero_sub: Seeds extracted from pods, with high industrial value
carob_seeds.desc: Carob seeds are extracted from the pod and constitute the raw material for locust bean gum (E410), a natural thickener widely used in the food industry. Our seeds are selected for their endosperm content.

carob_pulp.hero_sub: Dehydrated pulp, rich in natural sugars
carob_pulp.desc: Carob pulp is obtained by grinding and sieving the pods after seed extraction. It is rich in natural sugars (glucose, fructose, sucrose) and fiber. Widely used in animal feed and as a natural substitute in the food industry.

carob_flour.hero_sub: Fine flour from ground pulp, natural cocoa substitute
carob_flour.desc: Carob flour is produced by finely grinding dried pulp. Naturally sweet, caffeine-free and theobromine-free, it is used as a cocoa substitute in the food, bakery and confectionery industry. It is also valued for its binding properties and fiber content.

legumes.hero_sub: Import-Export of all varieties of legumes
legumes.desc: Les Greniers du Saïss handles the import and export of all varieties of legumes: lentils, chickpeas, fava beans, kidney beans, dried peas. We select our suppliers according to strict quality criteria and offer products tailored to each market's specifications.

applications.hero_sub: Carob and its derivatives serving industries worldwide
applications.intro_p: Moroccan carob is valued across many industrial sectors for its natural properties: sweetening power, thickening effect, fiber richness and caffeine-free nature. Discover the main application areas.
applications.food_desc: Natural cocoa substitute in chocolates, pastries and confectionery. Thickener and stabilizer (E410). Fiber enrichment of cereal products.
applications.pharma_desc: Binder and excipient in tablet manufacturing. Natural treatment for digestive disorders. Astringent properties used in herbal medicine.
applications.cosmet_desc: Natural active ingredient in skincare. Emulsifier in creams and lotions. Antioxidant properties in anti-aging formulations.
applications.feed_desc: Natural energy source for livestock, poultry and pets. Rich in natural sugars and fiber. Natural alternative to synthetic additives.
applications.sports_desc: Caffeine-free cocoa substitute in sports bars and drinks. Fiber and mineral content. Suitable for vegan and gluten-free diets.
applications.petfood_desc: Natural ingredient in pet food products. Beneficial properties for animal digestion.
applications.cta_title: Interested in Our Products for Your Industry?
applications.cta_sub: Our team is available to answer your technical questions and provide a personalized quote.

sustainability.hero_sub: A commitment to responsible agriculture and positive impact
sustainability.local_p1: We work in direct partnership with farmers in the Saïss region. This local sourcing guarantees the freshness and quality of our products, reduces the carbon footprint of our supply chain and supports the Moroccan rural economy.
sustainability.local_p2: Our farmer partners benefit from fair prices and access to international markets they could not reach on their own.
sustainability.env_p1: The carob tree is remarkably adapted to the semi-arid Mediterranean climate. It requires little water and inputs, contributes to combating soil erosion and sequesters CO₂.
sustainability.env_p2: We encourage our partners to adopt agricultural practices that respect local biodiversity.
sustainability.community_p: By employing local farmers, collectors and processors, we directly contribute to the economic development of the Saïss region and the preservation of Moroccan agricultural know-how.
sustainability.p1: 100% local sourcing in the Saïss region

quality.step1_desc: Rigorous selection of raw materials. Only batches meeting our criteria are accepted.
quality.step2_desc: Optical and mechanical sorting to remove impurities. Controlled cleaning and drying.
quality.step3_desc: Systematic physico-chemical and microbiological analysis. Results transmitted with each batch.
quality.step4_desc: Packaging tailored to client specifications. Full batch traceability.
quality.step5_desc: Certificates of origin, technical sheets, analyses available for every order.
quality.certif_note: We are working towards obtaining international certifications. Contact us for our current status.
quality.traceability_p: Each product batch is identified by a unique number allowing to trace its origin, harvest date, analyses performed and storage and transport conditions.
quality.cta_sub: Contact us to obtain our detailed product sheets and analysis certificates.
